faq_items.question: What are the age limits for parasailing?
faq_items.answer: Our standard age limits for parasailing are 16–65 years old. All participants under 18 must have a parent or legal guardian sign the waiver on-site. Guests over 60 should be in good overall health and may be asked additional screening questions. For safety reasons, we are generally not able to accept participants younger than 16 or older than 65, but feel free to contact us if you have questions about specific situations.

faq_items.question: Are there weight or health restrictions for parasailing?
faq_items.answer: Yes. For safety and insurance reasons, there is a combined weight limit of approximately 400–450 lbs (181–204 kg) per flight, which may vary slightly based on wind and sea conditions. Participants should be able to stand, walk short distances, and follow crew instructions. We do not recommend parasailing for guests who are pregnant, have serious back, neck, or heart conditions, have recently undergone major surgery, or have been advised by a physician to avoid strenuous activity. If you are unsure whether it is safe for you to participate, please consult your doctor before booking.

faq_items.question: Can I reschedule or change my booking?
faq_items.answer: Yes. Most tours and rentals can be rescheduled free of charge up to 24 hours before the scheduled start time, subject to availability. To change your date or time, go to the "My Bookings" section, enter your booking ID and last name, and select the booking you want to modify. If your new date or time is available, you can confirm the change instantly. Changes requested within 24 hours of the activity start time may incur a fee or may not be possible, depending on our current schedule and policies.

faq_items.question: What is your cancellation policy?
faq_items.answer: For most parasailing tours, boat rentals, and combo packages, you can cancel up to 24 hours before the scheduled start time for a full refund. Cancellations made within 24 hours, no-shows, or late arrivals are generally non-refundable. In the event that we cancel an activity due to weather or safety concerns, you will be offered a free reschedule or a full refund. Some special events and private charters may have different cancellation terms, which are shown on the activity details page during booking.

faq_items.question: What payment methods do you accept?
faq_items.answer: We accept all major credit and debit cards (Visa, Mastercard, American Express, Discover), as well as many mobile wallets such as Apple Pay and Google Pay for online bookings. You can also redeem our digital gift cards at checkout by entering your gift card code. Cash payments may be accepted on-site for walk-in bookings, but advance online reservations are strongly recommended to secure your preferred date and time.

gift_card_types.name: Boat Rentals Only Digital Gift Card
gift_card_types.description: This digital gift card can be redeemed for any of our boat rentals, including speedboats, pontoons, and private cruises. It cannot be used for parasailing tours or combo packages.

gift_card_types.name: All Activities Gift Card
gift_card_types.description: Our most flexible option. This gift card can be used toward any parasailing tour, boat rental, combo package, or add-on available on our website.

gift_card_types.name: Parasailing Only Gift Card
gift_card_types.description: Perfect for thrill-seekers. This card is valid exclusively for parasailing tours and parasailing-related add-ons such as photo packages.

gift_card_types.name: Packages & Combos Gift Card
gift_card_types.description: Give the gift of a full-day experience. This card can be redeemed for eligible combo packages, including parasailing + jet ski and other bundled adventures.

experiences.name: Budget Morning Parasailing Flight
experiences.description: A wallet-friendly morning parasailing experience with stunning coastal views. Perfect for first-time flyers who want to beat the crowds and enjoy smoother morning conditions.

experiences.name: Standard Morning Parasailing Tour
experiences.description: Our classic morning parasailing tour with a bit more airtime and flexible departure times. Ideal for couples and small groups looking for a relaxed start to the day.

experiences.name: Weekday 9:00 AM Parasailing Special
experiences.description: A discounted weekday parasailing special for departures at or after 9:00 AM. Great for guests who want to sleep in a little but still enjoy calm morning seas.

experiences.name: Afternoon Classic Parasailing Tour
experiences.description: Enjoy warm breezes and bright skies on our afternoon parasailing tour. Includes a scenic boat ride, safety briefing, and breathtaking views from high above the water.

experiences.name: Hotel Pickup Express Parasailing Tour
experiences.description: Convenient hotel pickup parasailing tour with a streamlined itinerary. Includes round-trip transportation, safety briefing, and at least 1 hour of total experience time.
experiences.location: Hotel pickup within beach zone; departs from Oceanfront Marina

experiences.name: Hotel Pickup Extended Parasailing Tour
experiences.description: A longer hotel-pickup parasailing experience with additional cruising time and extended airtime. Perfect for guests who want to make the most of their time on the water.
experiences.location: Hotel pickup within beach zone; departs from Oceanfront Marina

experiences.name: 2-Hour 115 hp Speedboat Rental (Fuel Included)
experiences.description: A value-friendly 115 hp speedboat rental ideal for small groups. Fuel for the booked duration is included, so you can focus on fun instead of refueling.

experiences.name: 2-Hour 150 hp Premium Speedboat Rental
experiences.description: Upgrade to a more powerful 150 hp speedboat with an upgraded sound system and extra comfort seating. Ideal for guests who want a higher-performance ride.

experiences.name: 3-Hour Pontoon Boat Value Rental
experiences.description: A comfortable pontoon boat rental for small groups who want a relaxed afternoon on the water. Great for families or friends looking to picnic, swim, and explore.

experiences.name: 3-Hour Premium Pontoon Boat Rental
experiences.description: An upgraded pontoon with plush seating and a Bluetooth sound system. Perfect for celebrations and small parties on the water.

experiences.name: Private Sunset Cruise with Live Music (BYOB)
experiences.description: A 2-hour private sunset cruise featuring a live musician and a relaxed BYOB policy. Enjoy golden-hour views, your favorite drinks, and a personalized soundtrack on the water.

experiences.name: Luxury Yacht Sunset Charter
experiences.description: A premium 2-hour sunset charter aboard a luxury yacht, featuring spacious decks, comfortable seating, and complimentary soft drinks. Ideal for special occasions and small groups.

experiences.name: Parasailing + Jet Ski Combo (Value)
experiences.description: A value-packed combo that includes one parasailing flight and a shared jet ski session. With at least 2.5 hours of total experience time, it’s perfect for thrill-seekers on a budget.
experiences.location: Harbor Pier A & Jet Ski Dock, Oceanfront Marina

experiences.name: Parasailing + Jet Ski Combo (Premium)
experiences.description: A premium combo package with longer parasailing airtime and extended jet ski riding. Designed for guests who want more time in the air and on the water.
experiences.location: Harbor Pier A & Jet Ski Dock, Oceanfront Marina
